items.text: The GCAS_singleton component maintains a real-valued recursive variable t with initial value 0.0 and step size 0.1
items.fragment: The GCAS_singleton component maintains a real-valued recursive variable t with initial value 0.0 and step size 0.1
items.requirement_fragment: The GCAS_singleton component maintains a real-valued recursive variable t with initial value 0.0 and step size 0.1

items.text: The GCAS_singleton component defines the constant minHeightAllowed as 200.0
items.fragment: The GCAS_singleton component defines the constant minHeightAllowed as 200.0
items.requirement_fragment: The GCAS_singleton component defines the constant minHeightAllowed as 200.0

items.text: The GCAS_singleton component invokes the kinematicLinearization function from the gcas_nodes library, passing t as a parameter, to compute the height variable height
items.fragment: The GCAS_singleton component invokes the kinematicLinearization function from the gcas_nodes library, passing t as a parameter, to compute the height variable height
items.requirement_fragment: The GCAS_singleton component invokes the kinematicLinearization function from the gcas_nodes library, passing t as a parameter, to compute the height variable height

items.text: The component sets the output port timeToRecovery to the constant 3.7
items.fragment: The component sets the output port timeToRecovery to the constant 3.7
items.requirement_fragment: The component sets the output port timeToRecovery to the constant 3.7

items.text: When the simulation time t reaches or exceeds the recovery time, the computed height value must always be greater than minHeightAllowed
items.fragment: When the simulation time t reaches or exceeds the recovery time, the computed height value must always be greater than minHeightAllowed
items.requirement_fragment: When the simulation time t reaches or exceeds the recovery time, the computed height value must always be greater than minHeightAllowed

items.text: When the simulation time t reaches or exceeds the recovery time, the current height value must be greater than the previous height value to indicate a pull-up trend
